title: The Movie
description: The Movie - Stuff from Minecraft Movie!
body:
### **The Movie - Stuff from Minecraft Movie!**
Buck Chuckets: A special bucket that allows you to transport both lava and water simultaneously in a single item.

Lava Chicken: The famous food from the Minecraft movie! Eating it gives you the Burn II effect, dealing damage over 5 seconds.

Malgosha Sword: A legendary sword that instantly kills any entity with just one hit.

Fries and Cold Fries: Inspired by the Minecraft Movie x McDonald's collaboration! Cold Fries can be smelted to create delicious Fries.
